pageContext.name: Hulk Miniature
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the fan-favorite Hulk, casting the angry brute in fine pewter, but preserving the meticulous (and slightly cartoonish) physical details. Posed with both fists clenched, Hulk is ready to SMASH!  Royal Selangor has painstakingly reproduced Hulk in fine detail, despite its miniature size. Being just over 2 inches tall, this miniature gives collectors a chance to own their very own fun-sized Hulk.  The Hulk Miniature Pewter Collectible comes boxed in a black box, emblazoned with the Marvel logo and featuring a large window for collectors that just want to keep it in mint condition.
